programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: While in Texas, the guys find two once-in-a-lifetime automotive picking opportunities before meeting another collector with a meteorite and branding irons, and afterwards, a sprawling junkyard has an owner who is reluctant to sell.

programs.title: American Restoration
programs.desc: Rick is contacted to restore a replica of an F-105 fighter jet. Will the crew be able to execute their plan of attack, or will they miss the mark and abort the mission?

programs.title: The Front Bar
programs.desc: Join Sam Pang, Mick Molloy and Andy Maher as they share a laugh about the world of AFL and catch up with stars of yesteryear and today.

programs.title: LIV Golf League
programs.desc: The 2026 LIV Golf Tour heads to Trump National Golf Club in Potomac Falls, USA. Catch all the action, live and free on 7 and 7plus.

programs.title: LIV Golf League
programs.desc: The 2026 LIV Golf Tour heads to Trump National Golf Club in Potomac Falls, USA. Catch all the action, live and free on 7 and 7plus.

programs.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programs.desc: Troy and Pickle attempt to track down a giant python known as the Night Serpent. Meanwhile, Tess convinces Bill to try out new hunting grounds.
